CREATE TABLE series(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT covarPopStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM series WHERE x_value > 0);
CREATE TABLE series2(i UInt32, z_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT covarPopStable(s.x_value, s2.z_value) FROM series AS s JOIN series2 AS s2 ON s.i = s2.i;
SELECT covarPopStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM series WHERE i % 2 = 0) AS subquery);
CREATE TABLE series3(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY i;
INSERT INTO series3(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, 0.0, 0.0), (2, 0.0, 0.0), (3, 0.0, 0.0);
SELECT covarPopStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM series UNION ALL SELECT 1.0 AS x_value, 2.0 AS y_value) AS combined;
SELECT covarPopStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM series WHERE y_value IS NOT NULL) WHERE x_value < 10;
